name: Link
description: Navigation element for linking to pages, resources, or locations.

href.description: Destination URL, anchor, or protocol link (for example `mailto:` or `tel:`).

target.description: Where to open the linked document.

rel.description: Relationship of the linked URL; use `noopener`/`noreferrer` for cross-origin `_blank` links.

color.description: Visual color treatment for link text.

IconComponent.description: Icon shown for `_blank` links; set to `null` to hide it where appropriate.

render.description: Custom render strategy for anchor element composition.

maxRows.description: Maximum visible text rows before truncation.

styleAs.description: Text presentation style inherited from `Text` component.

variant.description: Deprecated alias path for visual styling; prefer `color`.

keyboard: Enter activates navigation when `href` is present
Tab/Shift+Tab move focus through links in document order
aria: Link text must be meaningful out of context and unique where possible
If link has icon-only content, provide `aria-label`
When link has icon plus text, set icon `aria-hidden=true` to avoid duplicate announcement
For `_blank` links, accessible text includes an external-navigation cue
